cases.name: route_existing_spec_to_goal
cases.input: Feature directory has spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md. User asks to start /goal.
expected: routing starts with a Spec Kit consultation
existing spec-kit artifacts are reused instead of recreated
merlin-skills-routing runs first
create-goal is selected
GOAL.md references spec-kit artifacts

cases.name: route_missing_spec_setup_to_speckit_cli
cases.input: Repo has no .specify directory and user wants to start using GitHub Spec Kit with Codex.
expected: speckit-cli is selected
official specify CLI is used
Codex integration installs speckit-* skills

cases.name: route_feature_idea_to_speckit_artifacts
cases.input: User has a concrete feature idea but no spec.md, plan.md, or tasks.md yet.
expected: speckit-specify creates the feature spec
speckit-clarify is used when ambiguity remains
speckit-plan and speckit-tasks run before create-goal

cases.name: keep_upstream_implementation_non_default
cases.input: Feature has tasks.md and user asks to run the normal Merlin long-running implementation path.
expected: create-goal is selected before /goal
speckit-implement is not selected by default
speckit-implement is reserved for explicit upstream-native implementation requests

cases.name: route_tasks_to_tdd_slice
cases.input: Feature has spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and GOAL.md. User asks to start implementing the first testable task with TDD.
expected: tdd is treated as the implementation discipline after tasks.md and GOAL.md exist
speckit-tasks is not replaced by tdd
the next step is one behavior, one failing test, minimal implementation, then the next behavior

cases.name: block_unclear_goal
cases.input: spec.md contains [NEEDS CLARIFICATION]. User asks to run /goal anyway.
expected: create-goal refuses
blocking clarification is reported
/goal is not launched

cases.name: web_feature_verification
cases.input: A UI feature has been implemented and needs proof before ship.
expected: gstack-qa is routed
playwright-cli is used for browser proof
ship is last

cases.name: route_product_idea_to_brainstorming
cases.input: User has an early product idea and asks whether it is worth building.
expected: routing starts with a Spec Kit consultation before brainstorming
brainstorming is selected before spec-kit when the idea is ambiguous
brainstorming is framed as discovery for a future spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md
create-goal is not used until spec-kit artifacts exist

cases.name: consult_spec_kit_before_nontrivial_work
cases.input: User asks for a non-trivial implementation task in a repo that may or may not already have .specify and specs/<feature> artifacts.
expected: merlin-skills-routing performs a Spec Kit consultation first
.specify and specs/<feature> are checked before selecting the next skill
the route decides whether to create, refresh, or reuse spec-kit artifacts
no separate GOAL_STATUS or extra project-management file is introduced by default

cases.name: reuse_tasks_as_progress_layer
cases.input: A long-running goal is partially implemented and tasks.md contains checked and unchecked task boxes.
expected: tasks.md checkboxes are treated as the implementation progress ledger
GOAL.md resume protocol is used for continuation
latest QA or browser proof is inspected when present
a new progress file is not required before continuing

cases.name: route_global_install_to_install_skill
cases.input: User asks to install Merlin Skills globally without naming Codex or Claude.
expected: install-merlin-skills is selected
both global Codex and global Claude roots are targeted
no gstack runtime sidecar is installed

cases.name: route_project_install_to_instruction_block
cases.input: User asks to install Merlin Skills into the current repo for Codex.
expected: install-merlin-skills is selected
project .codex/skills is targeted
AGENTS.md receives or refreshes one Merlin Skills block

cases.name: route_browser_dogfood_to_playwright
cases.input: User asks to dogfood a local web app, click through the flow, and capture screenshots.
expected: playwright-cli is selected for browser proof
playwright-skill remains available for reusable scripts
gstack-ship is not selected before browser evidence exists

cases.name: routing_inventory_covers_every_skill
cases.input: Repo has an installed skill under skills/<name>/SKILL.md.
expected: merlin-skills-routing mentions that installed skill by exact install-facing name
validate-layout fails if any installed skill is missing from the router
source packs are represented, including spec-kit, AB Method, Matt Pocock, gstack, Playwright, Superpowers, and Merlin-owned meta skills
spec-kit runtime skills are represented as speckit-* skills
